coverage_matrix.request_semantics: Claude Code message.usage rows are per message/request observations.
coverage_matrix.cumulative_semantics: Session rollups are derived by summing message usage rows; Claude Code does not supply a separate cumulative session high-water event.
coverage_matrix.cache_semantics: cache_read_input_tokens and cache_creation_input_tokens are preserved as cached_input and cache_write lanes and are not folded into generic input/output.
notes: Exact token telemetry is available only where exported records include message.usage.
coverage_matrix.rebuild_guidance: rebuild index.db from source.db/raw archives so usage events and rollups are materialized from source evidence

coverage_matrix.request_semantics: Codex last_token_usage is request/current-window telemetry and can be summed by request when present.
coverage_matrix.cumulative_semantics: Codex total_token_usage is cumulative and session-global; rollups take the latest total per session to avoid double-counting.
coverage_matrix.cache_semantics: cached_input_tokens and cache write/cache creation aliases are preserved as separate lanes and are not folded into generic input/output.
notes: model_context_window is carried on token_count events when the provider supplies it.
coverage_matrix.rebuild_guidance: rebuild index.db from source.db/raw archives so usage events and rollups are materialized from source evidence

coverage_matrix.request_semantics: ChatGPT exports do not carry reliable per-request token counters.
coverage_matrix.cumulative_semantics: Provider/account UI totals are external summaries and are not reconstructed from transcript text.
coverage_matrix.cache_semantics: No cache read/write token lanes are available in ChatGPT export rows.
notes: Cost-looking metadata is not treated as exact token telemetry.
coverage_matrix.rebuild_guidance: rebuild index.db from source.db/raw archives so usage events and rollups are materialized from source evidence
